name: Sourdough Whole Wheat Bread
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Basic sourdough starter, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
Makes 1 loaf
Sponge
For sponge: Dissolve yeast in 1/4 cup lukewarm water. In a large bowl, let stand for 5 minutes to proof. Add starter, dry milk, and remaining warm water, and blend well. Add wheat flour, all-purpose flour, and wheat germ, and beat for 4 to 5 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in a warm, draft-free area until doubled in volume, about 1 hour.
Add molasses, margarine, salt, baking soda, and 1 1/4 cups all-purpose flour. Beat until dough is stiff, adding the remaining 1/2 cup all-purpose flour as necessary.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 10 to 15 minutes. Transfer to a greased bowl. Cover and let rise in a warm, draft-free area until doubled, about 1 1/2 hours.
Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan. Punch dough down and shape into a loaf. Transfer to the pan. Cover and let rise in a warm, draft-free area for about 45 minutes.
Preheat oven to 375°F. Bake until loaf is nicely browned, about 35 minutes.
